faq.a: We send access links within 48 hours of signup. Early signups get priority onboarding and exclusive first-partner sessions.
BridgeEast is completely free. Our partners pay to be featured, so you always have access to the full platform at no cost.

faq.q: Can I share my access with my team?
faq.a: Yes! Once you join, you can add team members and collaborators. We recommend including your co-founders and key advisors.

faq.q: Do I have to be opening soon?
faq.a: No. Whether you're in the planning phase or launching within 6 months, BridgeEast has resources for you. We serve founders at every stage.

faq.q: What if my cuisine type isn't covered?
faq.a: Our guides and data focus on food & beverage in general, with specific depth on Asian cuisines. If you need specialized guidance, our partner network can help.

marketplace.tagline: The marketplace for Asian F&B businesses for sale.

home.heroTitle: Buy or sell an Asian restaurant, café, or bubble tea shop.
home.heroSubtitle: From bubble tea storefronts to izakayas to ghost kitchens, Pass The Plate is the bilingual marketplace built for the $240B Asian F&B transition market.

items.title: Bilingual by default
items.body: Listings and inquiries in English plus Mandarin, Korean, and Vietnamese — your audience reads in their language.

items.title: Vetted buyer demand
items.body: Operators, search funds, EB-5/E-2 investors, and SBA borrowers — pre-screened before they reach out.

items.title: NDA-gated financials
items.body: Real numbers stay private. Buyers sign your NDA before they see revenue, cash flow, and rent.

items.title: Free to list
items.body: Zero upfront. We earn a small success fee only when your deal closes.

verifyPage.heading: Prove you’re ready to inquire
verifyPage.intro: Sellers want to talk to qualified buyers. Upload one document — a recent bank statement, asset summary, or an SBA pre-qualification letter — and a Pass The Plate admin will verify within 1–2 business days.
verifyPage.statusNoneBody: Upload a document to start using the marketplace.
verifyPage.statusPendingBody: Our team reviews submissions within 1–2 business days.
verifyPage.statusVerifiedBody: You can inquire on listings without further checks.
verifyPage.statusRejectedBody: We couldn’t verify the last document. Re-upload to try again.
verifyPage.verifiedBody: You’re cleared to inquire on listings across the marketplace.
verifyPage.kindBankSub: Recent statement or asset summary showing available capital.
verifyPage.kindSbaSub: Pre-qualification letter from your SBA lender.
verifyPage.privacyNote: Your document is uploaded to a private bucket. Only Pass The Plate admins can view it during the review.
verifyPage.successBody: Thanks — our team manually reviews proof-of-funds within 1–2 business days. You’ll get an email when your buyer status flips to verified.

accountPage.loadFailed: We couldn’t load your profile. Try signing out and back in.
accountPage.noListingsBody: Post your operating business in front of qualified buyers — free to list.
accountPage.noInquiriesBody: Browse the marketplace and reach out to sellers whose businesses match your search.

accountPage.noStripeHelper: You don’t have a Stripe customer yet — start a paid plan from the Membership page first.
accountPage.settingsEmailHelp: Email changes coming soon — contact support to update.

contactPage.intro: Whether you’re buying, selling, joining as a partner, or just curious — drop us a line and we’ll get back within one business day.
